LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION FOR ORDER AND JUDGMENT FOR SALE OF DWELLING. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. COUNSEL FOR ASSIGNEE'S ORAL REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE WAS DENIED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DENIED. MR. BRKICH'S DECLARATION PROVIDES AN INSUFFICIENT BASIS FOR HIS OPINION OF THE FAIR MARKET VALUE. EVEN IF HIS OPINION THAT THE MARKET VALUE IS $398,900 IS ACCEPTED, IT IS NOT CLEAR THAT THE TOTAL OF DEFENDANT'S HOMESTEAD EXEMPTION AND THE KNOWN LIENS (EXCLUDING THE ONE RECORDED BY PLAINTIFF/ASSIGNEE) IS MORE THAN THE FAIR MARKET VALUE OF DEFENDANT'S ONE-THIRD INTEREST IN THE PROPERTY. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Application For Order/Judgment For Sale Of Dwelling; Declaration Of Edward T. Weber; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; And Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Feb-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. ASSIGNEE/PETITIONER GRYPHON SOLUTIONS, LLC'S Motion For Application For Order/Judgment For Sale Of Dwelling is granted. The court will execute petitioner's form of order. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Order To Show Cause Why An Order For Sale Of Dwelling Should Not Issue
Off Calendar Jan-09-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Order To Show Cause Why An Order For Sale Of Dwelling Should Not Issue is taken off calendar as a duplicate entry. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Application For Order/Judgment For Sale Of Dwelling; Declaration Of Edward T. Weber; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; And Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Jan-09-2015 Continued To Feb-09-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. ROBERT F. COHEN, Tel No. (310) 858-9771 appearing for the Petitioner;
Defendant Wayne Wong, Tel No. (415) 525-1616 appearing in pro per.

The Court had offered Petitioner the opportunity to provide at hearing evidence sufficient to support the reduced Deed of Trust. At the hearing, the Court had only been provided with a credit report. The Court granted Petitioner's request for continuance of hearing to obtain relevant bank records. Petitioner's Motion For Application For Order/Judgment For Sale Of Dwelling is continued to February 9, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/EHG)

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. The moving party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of its moving papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. Notice Of Junion Lien Holders Of Hearing On Application For Order/Judgemnt For Sale Of Dwelling;Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Jul-16-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ronald R. Roundy, Esq. of Gryphon Solutions, LLC, Tel. 714.832.8780, appearing for Assignee and moving party via court call.
Wayne Wong, Tel. 415.413.0338, defendant appearing on his own behalf.

The matter was argued. After hearing, the court ruled as follows: ASSIGNEE GRYPHON SOLUTIONS, LLC's Application For Order/Judgment For Sale Of Dwelling is Denied. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar May-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Zach Toran, Esq., of the Law Offices of Zachary Toran, Tel. 415.850.9067, appearing for Assignee.
Wayne Wong, Tel. 415.913.8338, Defendant/Claimant appearing on his own behalf.

The matter was discussed. Defendant Wayne Wong's Claim of Exemption is granted for $50,000.00. The levying officer is directed to release any funds held to the judgment debtor. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Plaintiff'S Notice To Junior Lien Holders Of Hearing On Appliation For Order And Judgment For Sale Of Dwelling
Off Calendar May-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Zach Toran, Esq., of the Law Offices of Zachary Toran, Tel. 415.850.9067, appearing for Assignee and moving party.
Wayne Wong, Tel. 415.913.8338, Defendant appearing on his own behalf.

The matter was argued. Counsel for assignee's oral request for continuance was denied. The court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION FOR ORDER AND JUDGMENT FOR SALE OF DWELLING is Denied. Mr. Brkich's declaration provides an insufficient basis for his opinion of the fair market value. Even if his opinion that the market value is $398,900 is accepted, it is not clear that the total of Defendant's homestead exemption and the known liens (excluding the one recorded by Plaintiff/Assignee) is more than the fair market value of Defendant's one-third interest in the Property. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Notice To Junior Lien Holders Of Hearing On Appliation For Order/Judgment For Sale Of Dwelling
Off Calendar May-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. ASSIGNEE GRYPHON SOLUTIONS, LLC's Hearing on Application For Order/Judgment For Sale Of Dwelling is Continued on the court's own motion to May 14, 2012 at 9:30 am. to be heard concurrently with the Claim of Exemption. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Carol Haraburda CSR # 8052
